title: Heartbeat instructions in trls-worker subagent prompts
definition_of_done: Dispatch Subagent section of docs/trls-worker-SKILL.md explicitly instructs subagents to call trls heartbeat --issue ID for long-running work; make skill regenerates deployed skill; make check green
